lint.note: Lint not configured in services.yaml and golangci-lint not installed.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Bug in containsWord() index calculation: 'idx = idx + len(word)' should be 'idx = oldIdx + 1 + newIdx'. This causes false negatives in edge cases like 'DROPX DROP' where the second occurrence of DROP is not detected. However, this is unlikely to cause security issues because: (1) semicolon check catches most multi-statement attacks, (2) inline keyword detection works for most real-world cases.
Error return from WriteManifest is still ignored with '_'. This was pre-existing and not part of the fix scope, but could be improved to log or handle manifest write failures.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Patrones de Concurrencia' section documenting the mutex-on-shared-struct pattern for concurrent file writes

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed the TDD procedure correctly as documented in backend-worker skill: wrote failing test first (concurrent write test that would fail without proper mutex), implemented fix, verified with race detection flag.
rejectedObservations.reason: This confirms correct behavior but doesn't represent new knowledge to capture - it's validation that existing guidance works correctly.
